text_block_list.text: One morning at the academy entrance...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I was doing some modeling work until late last night, so naturally I was late getting home too... Yaaawn.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Meh, it's not like I'm gonna be late, so I guess I'll
take my time.
choice_data_list: Yeah, there's no point in rushing.
Yeah, there's no point in rushing.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh? Nah, there's no way—gah, you're right!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Looks like the time on my alarm clock was off... Sigh... I guess I'd better get a move on. Thanks, though.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Uh-huh. It's important to always stay cool and
collect—

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
That's the school bell! Crap, crap, crap. I guess
the time on my alarm clock was off.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Wait, but I might still make it if I run. Well, catch
ya later. You'd better not be late either!
